race.comment: JAYASHREE (6) got back to winning ways last start when scoring in a photo finish here 21 days ago. The slight rise in trip doesn't look an issue and the form out of her last start has held up strongly. Can continue to work her way through the grades. LOMBADINA (2) has a solid fitness base under her, racing in much tougher company recently. She'll find this much easier and things looks to shape nicely for her today out in distance. Ticks plenty of boxes here and a much better run is on the cards. MONTY ZOOMER (1) sat handy in the run and got the job done over 1400m last time. Should roll forward from the wide draw and he'll take plenty of catching back in grade. SECRICITY (11) is racing well without winning and comes back in trip slightly. Can make an impression with a favourable set-up. IT'S A LANCE (5) can improve stepping up in trip.
